text:

gmake  all-recursive

Making all in po

/usr/local/bin/msgfmt-new -o az.mo az.po
az.po:4191: syntax error
found 1 fatal error

How-To-Repeat: 
using /usr/local/bin/msgfmt replace /usr/local/bin/msgfmt-new can sucess make
.mo, but i do not sure it is ok to do this.
